heroHeadline: 48-Team Field Complete — Iraq & DR Congo Qualify; USMNT 0–2 Portugal
heroSubtitle: All 48 World Cup teams confirmed as Iraq beat Bolivia 2-1 and DR Congo beat Jamaica 1-0 AET on March 31; USMNT end March camp 0-2 with a combined 2-7 aggregate vs Belgium and Portugal, raising defensive alarm 70 days from kickoff; FIFA officially confirms Iran's participation April 1 despite government ban; last-minute ticket sales launch marred by website glitch April 2
footerNote: Data sourced from FIFA.com, UEFA.com, US Soccer, CONCACAF, ESPN, The Athletic, BBC Sport, AP, Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera, Human Rights Watch, Amnesty International, American Immigration Council, Middle East Monitor, CBS Sports
